report.summary: Built 2 new learn pages covering the 2026 perpetual DEX competitive landscape — a broad comparison (Hyperliquid vs Aster vs Lighter vs Paradex) and a focused Paradex ZK perpetuals protocol guide.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Decentralized perps have captured 26% of global futures volume (~$1T+ monthly) as of March 2026
Hyperliquid dominates: $40.7B weekly volume, $9.57B OI, $2.6T annual volume surpassing Coinbase ($1.4T)
Aster holds 20% market share ($31.78B weekly, $2.738B OI); Lighter at $25.38B weekly but volume dropped ~70% post-TGE
Paradex (Paradigm-backed) offers zero-fee ZK-encrypted trading on Starknet: $244B cumulative volume, $553M OI, $158M TVL
StarkWare-based platforms (Paradex, Extended, EdgeX) collectively ~16% of perp DEX volume
Emerging wave: Ostium (RWA perps), Boros (funding rate derivatives), World Markets (unified margin)

sections.title: Content Created
items: Perp DEX Wars 2026 comparison guide (~3,100 words, 1018 lines) — 10 sections covering all major perp DEXs with comparison table, decision framework, and risk analysis
Paradex ZK Perpetuals Guide 2026 (~2,600 words, 525 lines) — 9 sections covering protocol mechanics, DIME tokenomics, Starknet architecture, getting started guide, and competitive positioning

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Perp DEX Wars: title 'Perp DEX Wars 2026: Hyperliquid vs Aster vs Lighter vs Paradex Compared | degen0x', target keyword 'best perpetual dex 2026', Article + FAQ schema (6 FAQs), OpenGraph + Twitter cards

Paradex Guide: title 'Paradex Guide 2026: Zero-Fee ZK Perpetual Trading on Starknet Explained | degen0x', target keyword 'paradex crypto guide 2026', Article + FAQ schema (6 FAQs), OpenGraph + Twitter cards
Both pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES for immediate indexing
Internal linking: cross-linked to each other and to /learn/hyperliquid-guide, /tools/funding-rates, /tools/funding-rate-tracker, /learn/defi-safety-guide-2026, /learn/zero-knowledge-proofs-guide
